Triggering the system-level residential ground-floor shop deconstruction and the '2-employee weak-current repair/IT sundries shop cum training class' physical demotion probe. This enterprise, named 'Changtong Electronic Technology,' holds a business license that is a standard 'encyclopedia of tech buzzwords': claiming to manufacture communication terminal equipment, mobile terminal equipment, IoT equipment, industrial computers, and even micro-special motors! Faced with this sci-fi-level manufacturing list, the official system hastily classified it as an 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' enterprise. However, the forensic logic engine directly penetrated this heavy-industry disguise: the insured headcount is an extremely feeble 2 people! The paid-in capital is only 1.02 million RMB. The logical deduction instantly transforms into a highly grounded realistic painting of a residential area: inside the 1st-floor ground shop of Building 4 in the Rhine Dongjun residential compound, the boss with his wife or a buddy (2 people in total), clutching 1 million RMB, claims to have built a 'super electronics factory' capable of making mobile phones, industrial computers, and robots? The probe mercilessly deleted all 'manufacturing, processing' delusions from the license, extracting what it can actually do in the residential shop: 'retail and repair of electronic products, computers, and communication equipment; doing software outsourcing for mini-programs; running adult training classes or corporate consulting in the community.' The truth is extremely naked: this is a 100% pure 2-Employee Neighborhood IT Shop & Consulting Shell. The boss is a highly typical 'community handyman,' registering this shell just to have a billing header when taking on small jobs like fixing computers, running network cables, installing surveillance, or occasionally running a training class or taking a consulting gig. The official 'Electronic Manufacturing Entity' tag is the most rigid elevation of this grassroots neighborhood service store.
